mapper.select: select ent_code, out_put_id, template_code, template_name from t_ops_template

select ent_code, out_put_id, template_code, template_name from t_ops_template where out_put_id = #{outPutId} union all select ent_code, out_put_id, template_code, template_name from t_ops_template t where exists (select 1 from t_ent_out_put_info o where o.out_put_id = #{outPutId} and t.out_put_id = CONVERT(o.out_put_type, CHAR))

select t.ent_code, t.out_put_id, t.template_code, t.template_name, t.show_attachment_flag, t.show_qualified_flag, t.prompt_text, t.item_array, t.remark, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, e.ent_name, o.out_put_code, o.out_put_name from t_ops_template t left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = t.ent_code left join t_ent_out_put_info o on o.out_put_id = t.out_put_id where t.ent_code = #{entCode} and t.out_put_id = #{outPutId} and t.template_code = #{templateCode}
select count(1) from t_ops_template where ent_code = #{entCode} and out_put_id = #{outPutId} and template_code = #{templateCode}
mapper.insert: insert into t_ops_template (ent_code, out_put_id, template_code, template_name, show_attachment_flag, show_qualified_flag, prompt_text, item_array, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{entCode}, #{outPutId}, #{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{showAttachmentFlag}, #{showQualifiedFlag}, #{promptText}, #{itemArray}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy}, now())
mapper.select: select count(1) from t_ops_template where ent_code = #{entCode} and out_put_id = #{outPutId} and template_code != #{templateCode} and template_name = #{templateName}
mapper.update: update t_ops_template set template_name = #{templateName}, show_attachment_flag = #{showAttachmentFlag}, show_qualified_flag = #{showQualifiedFlag}, prompt_text = #{promptText}, item_array = #{itemArray}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where ent_code = #{entCode} and out_put_id = #{outPutId} and template_code = #{templateCode}
mapper.delete: delete from t_ops_template where ent_code = #{entCode} and out_put_id = #{outPutId} and template_code = #{templateCode}
